title: K-200 Payload Qualification Test Report
text:
# K-200 Payload Qualification Test Report

Document number: MD-DOC-482-A. Revision: A. Type: test-report. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2023-09-17. Last modified: 2024-08-13. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1097, P-1079.
